title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.
highlights: pull & run GGUF models with one command

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models via simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider for chains, agents, and RAG.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM integration to use any Ollama model as the generator in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”); supports RAG, multi-user, and model management.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI client that lets you chat, manage models, and view logs from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example showing how to scale Ollama models across a cluster for high-throughput serving.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that registers Ollama models as Generators or Embedders for production pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node that adds Ollama chat and generate actions to no-code workflows.

title: ollama4j
summary: Lightweight Java SDK for Ollama; supports chat, generate, pull, and list models with OkHttp.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; same ergonomics as Python/JS clients.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library generated from the OpenAPI spec; idiomatic structs and error handling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks (CPU/GPU) for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and autoscaling.
highlights: Helm repo served on GitHub Pages

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal Streamlit app that combines Ollama + Chroma for private RAG on PDFs and text files.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes and Q&A over your vault.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service that exposes OpenAI-compatible endpoints backed by Ollama for drop-in replacement.
